Projects.Name: HTML
Projects.Description:
This includes HTML pieces used to create custom visualizations in PowerBI. All of these visualizations are HTML + CSS combos used along with the HTML Content Visual. Most of these are designed to create interactive cards.

Examples:
- Card with Progress Bar:

![Card with progress bar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/henriqueetges/PowerBI---Repo/d49c20896b17b0b795a856572b6654dcb49e84f4/html/card-with-progress-bar/card-with-progress-bar.png)
- Card with Progress Bar and Delta:

![Card with progress bar and delta](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/henriqueetges/PowerBI---Repo/d49c20896b17b0b795a856572b6654dcb49e84f4/html/card-with-progress-bar+delta/card-with-progress-bar+delta.png)

Projects.Name: DAX
Projects.Description:
DAX is the language used by PowerBI to create measures and calculated columns. It is a descendant of MDX.
Most calculations using DAX are simple, but depending on how the data model is set up, we may need to create complex logic definitions to calculate business-defined metrics.

Projects.Name: Reports
Projects.Description:
In this section, I'll add public links to sample PowerBI reports.
![Sample Report](https://as2.ftcdn.net/v2/jpg/00/08/85/67/1000_F_8856770_vGp3qw2viEt06tqIY55EMwOC84nMBC6x.jpg)

Projects.Name: HTML
Projects.Description:
Aqui estão exemplos de componentes HTML usados para criar visualizações personalizadas no PowerBI. Todas essas visualizações são combinações de HTML + CSS utilizadas junto ao visual HTML Content. A maioria delas foi criada para gerar cartões interativos.

Exemplos:
- Cartão com barra de progresso: 
 ![Cartão com barra de progresso](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/henriqueetges/PowerBI---Repo/d49c20896b17b0b795a856572b6654dcb49e84f4/html/card-with-progress-bar/card-with-progress-bar.png)
- Cartão com barra de progresso e delta: 
 ![Cartão com barra de progresso e delta](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/henriqueetges/PowerBI---Repo/d49c20896b17b0b795a856572b6654dcb49e84f4/html/card-with-progress-bar+delta/card-with-progress-bar+delta.png)

Projects.Name: DAX
Projects.Description:
DAX é a linguagem usada pelo PowerBI para criar medidas e colunas calculadas. Ela é descendente da MDX.
A maioria dos cálculos com DAX é simples, mas dependendo de como o modelo de dados está estruturado, pode ser necessário definir lógicas complexas para calcular métricas definidas pelo negócio.

Projects.Name: Relatórios
Projects.Description:
Nesta seção, adicionarei links públicos para exemplos de relatórios PowerBI.
